de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match

Class TacletMatcherKit

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.TacletMatcherKit

  • public abstract class TacletMatcherKit
extends java.lang.Object
    Abstract factory for the creation of taclet matcher. Use method getKit() to get the concrete factory and call createTacletMatcher(Taclet) to create a matcher for a Taclet The active factory is chosen at runtime by passing a value for the system property taclet.match Currently supported values are: legacy and vm. The legacy matching algorithm is the one used since the beginning of KeY. It will soon become deprecated and replaced y vm as default.
